rationale: In the Experiment 4 setup, the authors cite Dubois et al. (2011) to support the claim that repeated message transmission can change downstream attitudes and behaviors. They also cite it when justifying their chain method as a way to isolate person-to-person spread. This gives the cited paper a clear functional role in both framing and method for part of the study, beyond a generic background mention.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Dubois et al. (2011) as a direct precedent for studying distortion over successive WOM transmissions and for using a chain-transmission design in Experiment 4. It applies that prior transmission paradigm to a different focal mechanism, interpersonal closeness and WOM valence, rather than re-testing certainty decay.
